title: keetia leucantha
intro: Keetia leucantha, also known as the white-flowering keetia, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Keetia leucantha include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Keetia leucantha is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, with the leaves and flowers being used to make medicine.
